title: AlbMC
description: A Little Better Minecraft is a fabric modpack intended to bring back the memories and feeling of playing BetterMC as a child, while being lightweight and built on newer versions
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/526f29ec2b1fba605556cbb081a0aa57aaa749ef.png)
---
A Little Better Minecraft is a fabric Vanilla+ modpack intended to bring back the memories and feeling of playing BetterMC as a child, while being lightweight and built on newer versions.

It contains popular Vanilla+ mods such as Farmer's Delight, Nature's Spirit, Supplementaries and Amendments.
It also comes with lot's of QoL mods and built-in resourcepacks.
